/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.5.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=26.3 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Uart.dir/Uart_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Uart.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Uart.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o -o Uart.app/Contents/MacOS/Uart -F/Users/makc/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/makc/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib /Users/makc/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /Users/makc/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /Users/makc/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
